rationale: Top-of-form corporation name. Form serves both Maine domestic and foreign corporations from a single 'entity.name' widget — the FIRST jurisdiction block disambiguates foreign corps. Same approach as sister-form LP_MLPA-13A.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its incorporation is
rationale: State or country of incorporation (for a domestic corp, 'Maine'; for a foreign corp, the home jurisdiction). Same key family as LP_MLPA-13A, CORP_MBCA-12, LLC_MLLC-12 — the universal 'home jurisdiction' primitive that works for both domestic and foreign filings.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date the current year's annual report was filed
rationale: Date the original annual report (the one being amended) was filed with SOS. Anchor for the §1623 amendment-window check. Same key as LP_MLPA-13A.

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 1
label_verbatim: THIRD: The information has changed as follows (attach additional pages, if necessary): line 1
rationale: Multi-line text widget for the substantive change description. Indexed line1–line4 mirroring LP_MLPA-13A's amendment.changes_description.lineN pattern (which has 8 inline lines).

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 2
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 3
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 4
rationale: THIRD line 4 (bottom). Attach additional pages if more than 4 lines needed.
Date on which the reported changes actually occurred (the operative date of the underlying change). Same key as LP_MLPA-13A and the upstream amendment.effective_date primitive.
Date the amended annual report was signed.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: *By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the corporate signer. Shape D per the filing-signer-shape convention (matches CORP_MBCA-11, LLC_MLLC-12). The page-1 footnote enumerates who may sign — capacity captures officer/clerk role.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees plus expedite premium ($85 domestic / $150 foreign base; $50 for 24h, $100 for immediate).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)

rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
